trickyParts: SessionRegistry has no List() method and no cache (unlike interests registry), so we iterate interests as the base set and enrich each with sessions.Get() — this means sessions without interests (stale, expired) won't appear, which is the correct behavior since they're inactive.
deviations: Issue mentioned updating oc ps — this command doesn't exist in this repo (external tooling). The endpoint is the deliverable; oc ps update is out of scope for this PR.
openQuestions: envoy_sessions has 5m TTL — sessions that haven't refreshed will show port:0 in the listing. Consumers should treat port:0 as 'session alive but port unknown'.
